---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- Password for this course: econ2026
     To change: update "econ2026" below AND in students/index.qmd -->
<script>
const COURSE_PASSWORD = "econ2026";
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  if (sessionStorage.getItem('econ467_auth') !== COURSE_PASSWORD) {
    window.location.href = 'index.html';
  }
});
</script>
```

::: {.content-section}

## Econ 467 — Environmental Economics {.section-heading}

**Winter 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Instructor: Dana C. Andersen**

---

### Syllabus {.section-heading}

```{=html}
<ul class="paper-list">
  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Course Syllabus — Winter 2026</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="../assets/syllabi/econ467_syllabus_2026w.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
```

---

### Lecture Slides {.section-heading}

Slides open in a new browser tab. Use arrow keys to navigate.

```{=html}
<!-- RELEASE CONTROL
     Slides 1–7 are currently visible.
     To release more: move <li> entries out of the HTML comment block below.
     To hide a slide: move its <li> entry into the comment block. -->
<ul class="paper-list">

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 01 — Introduction to Environmental Economics</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/01-slides-intro.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/01-slides-intro.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 02 — Market Failures</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/02-slides-market-failures.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/02-slides-market-failures.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 03 — Coasean Bargaining</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/03-slides-coase.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/03-slides-coase.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 04 — Standards</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/04-slides-standards.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/04-slides-standards.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 05 — Taxes</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/05-slides-taxes.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/05-slides-taxes.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 06 — Tradable Permits</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/06-slides-permits.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/06-slides-permits.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 07 — Policymaking Under Uncertainty</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/07-slides-uncertainty.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/07-slides-uncertainty.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <!-- SLIDES NOT YET RELEASED — move entries above this comment to release

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 08 — Multiple Market Failures and Second-Best Policies</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/08-slides-second-best.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/08-slides-second-best.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 09 — Carbon Tariffs</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/09-slides-carbon-tariffs.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/09-slides-carbon-tariffs.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 10 — Discounting and Cost-Benefit Analysis</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/10-slides-discounting.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/10-slides-discounting.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 11 — Travel Cost Method</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/11-slides-travel-cost.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/11-slides-travel-cost.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 12 — Contingent Valuation</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/12-slides-contingent-valuation.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/12-slides-contingent-valuation.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 13 — Hedonics and Real Estate Markets</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/13-slides-hedonics.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/13-slides-hedonics.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 14 — Carbon Accounting and Offset Markets</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/14-slides-offsets.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/14-slides-offsets.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 15 — Climate Risk and Financial Instruments</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/15-slides-climate-finance.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/15-slides-climate-finance.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 16 — Pollution and Health</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/16-slides-health.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/16-slides-health.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Lecture 17 — OLS / Regression</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="slides/econ467/17-slides-econometrics.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
      <a href="slides/econ467/17-slides-econometrics.html" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">HTML</a>
    </div>
  </li>

  END NOT YET RELEASED -->

</ul>
```

---

### Sample Midterms {.section-heading}

```{=html}
<!-- Add sample midterm PDFs to website/assets/syllabi/ and add entries here:
<ul class="paper-list">
  <li class="paper-item">
    <div class="paper-title">Sample Midterm 1</div>
    <div class="paper-links">
      <a href="../assets/syllabi/econ467_sample_midterm1_2026w.pdf" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
-->
<p><em>Sample exams will be posted here before each midterm.</em></p>
```

---

### In-Class Poll {.section-heading}

```{=html}
<p>
  Used during lectures for in-class questions. Have your <strong>@ualberta.ca</strong> email ready.
  A passcode will be shown on the projector when the poll is open.
</p>
<p>
  <a href="https://polling-server-production-708e.up.railway.app" class="paper-tag tag-journal" target="_blank">Open Poll →</a>
</p>
```

:::
